generated_oml:
instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains Container, Heatbed, Fan, InternalTemperatureSensor, ExternalTemperatureSensor1, ExternalTemperatureSensor2, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3 mm for thermal heating"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow of 0.02 m³/s for airflow control"
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor for internal incubator environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor for external environment location 1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor for external environment location 2"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for hardware control and data processing"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current isolation handling up to 4A"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor, ExternalTemperatureSensor1, ExternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, GitHubRepository
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal energy balance model with 2 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, GitHubRepository
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia with 4 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary, GitHubRepository
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication channel for sensor data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, CalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4HardwareController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for hardware control of heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, CalibrationService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares parameter calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for software implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, CalibrationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, OperationalOptimizationInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms to update model parameters based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateModelParametersAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction insights from simulation models for control logic"
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety insights from real-time monitoring"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational optimization insights from real-time monitoring"
]

instance UpdateModelParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update model parameters based on sensor data calibration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the DT controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which then actuates the heatbed and fan through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A RabbitMQ-based communication architecture where DT components (models, algorithms) listen to messages between the controller and low-level driver, forming a unified system for data processing and control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation via temperature uniformity tests (three sensors), residual error minimization during calibration using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver, and comparison of model predictions against experimental data (e.g., Model B better captures thermal inertia of the heatbed)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol over Ethernet/Wi-Fi via Raspberry Pi's built-in networking, with message-based communication between components using publish-subscribe patterns."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT software (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) is deployed on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B single-board computer."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Implementation of a safe protocol in the low-level driver to maintain device safety during actuation, preventing unsafe states through controlled hardware interactions and isolation of control signals via optocouplers."
]
